name: telegram-codex-scheduler
description: Private self-hosted Telegram scheduler for the locally authenticated Codex CLI.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:functions && npm run build:worker && npm run build:local
scripts.test: npm run test:local && npm run test -w @telegram-codex/shared && npm run test -w @telegram-codex/functions && npm run test -w @telegram-codex/worker
scripts.test:emulators: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-telegram-codex-scheduler "npm run test:emulators -w @telegram-codex/functions"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @telegram-codex/shared && npm run typecheck -w @telegram-codex/functions && npm run typecheck -w @telegram-codex/worker && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
